description:
GIVEN the user is watching a Live or Archive game
AND TTS is enabled
AND playback is paused

steps.action: WHEN the user initiates playback of the game
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: "Play, <half_inning>, <away_team> <away_team_score>, <home_team> <Home_team_score>, Press select to Pause.”

For example: "Play, Top of the 3rd, Red Sox 2, Yankees 2, Press Select to Pause."
